description: Replace single expiry date picker with 'Date document' + 'Durée de validité' dropdown in all document upload sections. Computed expiry feeds into Interventions step unchanged.

userStories.title: Data model: replace expiryDate with documentDate + validityDuration + validityCustomExpiry
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the GenericFileWithPreview type to carry document date, validity duration, and optional custom expiry instead of a single expiryDate, so that the UI can render two fields and compute expiry.
acceptanceCriteria: GenericFileWithPreview has documentDate?, validityDuration?, validityCustomExpiry? — expiryDate removed
computeExpiryDate utility function created and exported
userStories.notes: 3 new fields on GenericFileWithPreview, computeExpiryDate handles custom + duration modes

userStories.title: Hook: replace expiry setters with documentDate + validityDuration setters
userStories.description: As a developer, I want use-property-document-upload and use-multi-lot-document-upload to manage documentDate and validityDuration per slot, and compute expiryDate at upload time.
acceptanceCriteria: setSlotExpiryDate replaced by setSlotDocumentDate and setSlotValidityDuration and setSlotCustomExpiry
Upload FormData sends computed expiry_date (via computeExpiryDate)
userStories.notes: Both hooks updated. Also sends document_date to API for future use.

userStories.title: UI: DocumentSlotGeneric — date picker + validity dropdown
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a 'Date document' date picker and a 'Durée de validité' dropdown instead of a single expiry date, so I don't have to calculate expiry dates manually.
acceptanceCriteria: DatePicker labeled 'Date document' appears after file upload, default=today
Select dropdown labeled 'Validité' with options 1/2/3/5/10 ans + Personnalisé
Dropdown auto-selects based on slot's defaultValidityYears
Selecting 'Personnalisé' shows extra DatePicker for custom expiry date
Both compact and full modes render correctly
userStories.notes: DatePicker + Select side by side. Defaults set at file-add time in hooks. Personnalisé triggers conditional DatePicker.

userStories.title: Wiring: checklist + form use new callbacks, documentExpiryDates computed from new fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DocumentChecklistGeneric and lot-creation-form to use the new document date/validity callbacks, and documentExpiryDates to be computed from the new fields.
acceptanceCriteria: DocumentChecklistGeneric passes documentDate, validityDuration, defaultValidityYears to slots
Interventions step receives correct computed expiry dates
userStories.notes: Updated 5 files: checklist generic, building-contacts-step-v3, lot-creation-form, building-creation-form. documentExpiryDates computed from new fields everywhere.
